title: ThisModDoesNothing
body:
The mod of Nothing

Introducing ThisModDoesNothing, a stupid Minecraft mod that does nothing (technically).

Features Included

  • Void Blocks
  • Nothingness Blocks
  • NothingHere tab for creative mode
  • Blank paintings
  • Nothing Enchantment

I hope you enjoy the mod :)

Side note: I no longer have much interest in minecraft so this mod is not maintained. Contact me at "abstractmelons@gmail.com" OR "abstractmelon" on discord
